result:
All 11 tests pass. Here's what was implemented:

- **`init`** — creates `.minigit/{objects,commits,index,HEAD}`
- **`add <file>`** — computes MiniHash, stores blob in `objects/`, appends to index (dedup)
- **`commit -m`** — builds commit content with sorted files, hashes it, writes to `commits/`, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`log`** — traverses parent chain from HEAD, prints each commit

Two fixes were needed beyond the initial code:
1. Added `<PublishSingleFile>true</PublishSingleFile>` — the `build.sh` copies only the launcher binary, but without this flag the DLL stays in `publish/` making it fail at runtime
2. Added `<RemoveIntegerChecks>true</RemoveIntegerChecks>` — VB.NET throws `OverflowException` on `ULong` multiplication by default; the MiniHash algorithm requires natural 64-bit wraparound
